title: astragalus monspessulanus subsp. monspessulanus
intro: Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. monspessulanus, also known as the French or Spanish milk vetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. monspessulanus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus monspessulanus subsp. monspessulanus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
